title: corybas fornicatus
intro: Corybas fornicatus, also known as the Australian ground orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to Australia and New Zealand. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Corybas fornicatus include its potential to treat various conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. In herbal preparations, Corybas fornicatus is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is also used topically to apply directly to affected areas.
